caption: A man with a grey, spiked wig, glasses, and headphones sits in a studio setting. He wears a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, and brown suspenders. He is positioned in front of a black microphone on a boom arm. The background consists of a wall decorated with various framed photographs and apparel on hangers. On-screen text and logos appear in the lower half of the image, including a white "PODCAST" label and a red and white logo that reads "BOSS TALK JOY". Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position but shifts his facial expression, moving from a neutral look with his mouth slightly open to a squinting expression with a slight smile. The background elements and equipment remain static as the man makes these subtle facial movements.
